settings.heading: Services
settings.body_column_1:
Enter Autoworks, the have 20 years of automotive excellence, where your vehicle's needs are met with unparalleled care and expertise. Our team of seasoned qualified mechanics is committed to delivering superior service, guaranteeing a seamless and secure ride.

 Our comprehensive service include:

 Logbook servicing

  • Mechanical repairs
  • Brake pads and rotor replacements
  • Tire rotation, balancing & wheel alignments
  • Vehicle inspections and diagnostics
  • Performance works for old and new
settings.body_column_2:
Our commitment is to use only the finest parts and materials to guarantee your vehicle gets the utmost care 

At Autoworks car care, we pride ourselves on our commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction. Our team of experienced mechanics have years of combined experience and stays up to date with the latest industry developments. We’re passionate about keeping your vehicle in top condition.
